description: After T2/T3 merges touching runtime delivery or UI paths, run QA experience suite to catch surface regressions
rationale: three-brain Rule 8 (QA Agent: post-merge surface verification): after T2/T3 PRs touching apps/command-center/** or apps/worker/**, trigger pnpm qa:experience. Extended here to include apps/api/** per r1-r5-rules.json operator-ui and lifecycle-fsm scope.
